name: Melrose Plates
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cooked pasta, chicken, diced celery, mandarin oranges (or apples), sliced water chestnuts, and chopped parsley.
2. In a separate bowl, stir together the yogurt, honey, frozen orange juice concentrate, poppy seeds, dry mustard, and black pepper.
3. Pour the yogurt mixture over the chicken-pasta mixture and toss until everything is evenly coated.
4. Serve on a bed of lettuce.
Hint: "If you don't have any chicken on hand (or on foot or on head), try tuna, turkey, crab meat, or shrimp in its place."
